name: univa-universal-video-agent-framework
description: Build comprehensive video understanding agents that handle diverse video tasks, combining perception, reasoning, and action generation. Trigger: When creating agents for video understanding and analysis
content:
## UniVA: Universal Video Agent Framework

Build comprehensive video understanding agents that handle diverse video tasks, combining perception, reasoning, and action generation.

### Core Concept

Open-source framework for general-purpose video understanding agents

### Key Techniques

This skill focuses on implementing approaches from research in agent reasoning, model optimization, and system scaling.

### Implementation

For implementation details, refer to the source paper at https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.08521

### Practical Guidance

- **When to use**: When creating agents for video understanding and analysis
- **Integration**: Use with other agent skills for comprehensive systems
- **Scaling**: Consider performance trade-offs when applying at scale

### Reference

Paper: UniVA: Universal Video Agent towards Open-Source Next-Generation Video Generalist
arXiv: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.08521
